creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Koichiro IWAO from comment #15)
I mean version control for generating the patch for the entire port. I was able to get a usable diff from attached shar so that will work. It is not a standard way way for updating a port though.

Everything looks in order, I reran qa and found that my suggestion earlier was incorrect about removing CFLAGS/LDFLAGS so I reverted that part of the suggestion.
